{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322011815B96D6EC29DE3E2D8B43E"}"},"total":1659},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7530641327379039000","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"第一个世界线特别好看， （反对拐卖儿童，反对🙅‍♂️美化拐卖儿童的内容）  就喜欢这种不恋爱脑，独立，清醒的大女主了，特别喜欢这种搞笑女了，虽然有系统，但是系统也没有帮很多的忙，也没有开太大的挂，全是靠女主角的脑力，总之就是特别好看","text_exts":[{"e":58,"s":55,"text":"大女主","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%A4%A7%E5%A5%B3%E4%B8%BB&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774113495E2D8B43E%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227530641327379039000%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227300883303123389494%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%A4%A7%E5%A5%B3%E4%B8%BB%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1753367263,"group_id":"7300883303123389494","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+oIL8st9R1u+6ItA7VenQg=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/44ed05c84a8a401e844a79df3cce0bcf~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702117&x-signature=aHs8Y8abZaiF8s5ReMLmiUJMNmc%3D","user_id":"570004849558859","user_name":"南三枝ฅ"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"570004849558859","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7300883303123389494","book_info":{"abstract":"【快穿+无CP+疯批+无道德+打脸虐渣】
       每一个成功主角的背后，都有一群默默奉献的悲惨炮灰。
　　而放下个人素质享受缺德人生的程某人一进快穿局，就被丢进炮灰修罗场。
       她面对的主角团，不是人贩子就是家暴男，不是穿越者就是重生者，个个手握金手指，气运逆天。
　　面对地狱开局，系统6868瑟瑟发抖：宿主，你就没有点特长吗？
　　程也：我命特长
　　人贩子害我残疾乞讨家破人亡？随手一个全家缝纫机大礼包砸过去。
　　家暴男打我pua我？反手三万八报个泰拳班，医院科室你想住哪间住哪间。
       穿越女欺我是个古代女人没有见识、女扮男装谋财害命？薅你羊毛助我登基为帝！
       圣母妈道德绑架让我跟她一起当圣母养八个孩子？不好意思，我程某人没有道德，你有道德，你多牺牲点。
       主角团：搞不过搞不过，等她死了我们就有出头之日了。
　　程也拿出保温杯：嘿嘿，我要默默泡枸杞，悄悄养生，然后熬死你们所有人。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/7e8378d471458bce391d3f69bef34949","author":"偶蒜","author_id":"","book_id":"7300883303123389494","book_name":"快穿：我癫起来连天道都怕","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d8f0f0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":24,"name":"快穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=24&name=快穿&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":32,"name":"幻想言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=32&name=幻想言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":457,"name":"虐渣","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=457&name=虐渣&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7301582442828137001","read_count":"11516","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1016100"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.7","serial_count":"497","tags":"快穿,现代言情,系统,幻想言情,穿越,无CP,虐渣,打脸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/33f3fde2e52ea834784c5a64dd46342c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779297495&x-signature=IyMbFhufdWis8fSfV95xKYN47Ro%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3338582580278483","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cn t":"186"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322011815B96D6EC29DE3E2D8B43E"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":7,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":21537,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":2508},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7347665871216821016","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"超级无敌好看的啊，我已经很久不看快穿了，毕竟穿来穿去不是攻略男人就是打脸绿茶啥的，反正看腻了。但这本不一样，它包含了很多元素，不止于传统文化的失传还有很多很多，说不清但心里的震骇是止不住的。
尤其是第一个副本，看到一半的时候评论区科普“雷家”是真实存在的甚至有出现在博物馆里，那一刻真的头皮发麻全身鸡皮疙瘩都起来了，在看到结局的时候甚至有那么一刻觉得女主是真实存在的，她的壮举真的让我们的文化走向了国际，开创出了新的不一样的时代，而不是一个虚构，存在于幻想里的人物。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1710818170,"group_id":"7300883303123389494","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"普普通通，只是喜欢万人迷文","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3CFR5mbjI0OuAfCZmKrdl1m0ihJmYPTC365dDcskXt3","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a550bcf06757433eb1177691cde0bac0~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776709302&x-signature=G6HAHRKbIIyfmZqphZRft5E3SPU%3D","user_id":"3151630354359837","user_name":"被财神偏爱的女人"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3151630354359837","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7300883303123389494","book_info":{"abstract":"【快穿+无CP+疯批+无道德+打脸虐渣】
